summary: Every legal input contains at most four decimal digits, which is too narrow for an honest runtime scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: num is at most 10000 and contains only digits 6 and 9

replacement_checks.evidence: The implementation scans the decimal representation once, replaces at most the first 6, and parses the d-digit result.
Regression exhaustively checks every legal 6/9 string of lengths one through four against independent enumeration of no change and every single flipped digit.
